ELEMENTALCLASH
WELCOME TO ELEMENTAL CLASH
Fast-paced arena brawling with 10 elements,
each with their own abilities and playstyle.
Every match plays differently.
New here? Start with
HOW TO PLAY
🎯 Objective
First team to reach the kill limit wins. Default is 5 kills in a 3:30 match. Use Match Rules to adjust either — kills step from 5 to 100 in increments of 5, time from 1:00 to 10:00, and both can be set to ∞ for a freeplay session. If time runs out with no winner, the match goes to sudden death.
👥 Couch Multiplayer
Up to four human players can play on the same screen. In the hero select lobby, use the − count + pill to add up to 6 player slots, then tap the TYPE pill on any slot to toggle it between CPU and Human (capped at 4 humans). Tap the TEAM pill to change team colour.
Each player gets their own coloured identity — P1 gold, P2 cyan, P3 orange, P4 lime — shown on portrait badges, character rings, and controller overlays. Controller layout: P1 bottom-left, P2 bottom-right, P3 top-left, P4 top-right. Any player can pause with their Start button. The camera zooms out automatically to keep all players on screen.
💡 Set all slots to CPU to watch a full bot match in spectator mode. Press Tab / L3 to cycle between characters.
🎮 Controls
⌨ KEYBOARD / MOUSE
WASDMove
ClickAuto-attack
Q E R Ability 1 / Ability 2 / Ultimate
FSpecial
GRock Buster
ShiftSprint
TabCycle Target
UHold — Scoreboard
EscPause
🎮 CONTROLLER
Left StickMove
Right Stick / RTAuto-attack
X□ A✕ RBR1 Ability 1 / Ability 2 / Ultimate
Y△ Special
B○ Rock Buster
LBL1 Sprint
L3 Cycle Target
StartOptions Pause
💡 All bindings are fully remappable in Options → Controls.
⚡ Abilities & Mana
Each element has 3 abilities plus a special — shown in the HUD at the bottom of the screen. Abilities cost mana, which regenerates passively. The special is free and has its own cooldown.
Landing an ability opens a 0.5s window where your next auto-attack deals +20% damage. Hitting a CC'd target deals +30% bonus damage. Each kill grants a momentum stack — two stacks in quick succession triggers ON FIRE for bonus damage.
When your HP drops below 20%, a red arrow appears around your character pointing toward the nearest health pack. A blue arrow does the same for mana packs — both pulse faster the more critical your situation.
Ultimates are powerful but can't one-shot a full health target — a single ult hit is capped at 85% of the target's max HP. Against already-damaged targets they hit full. Finish the job.
💥 Special Ability
Your special is tied to your combat class, not your element. Free, fast recharge.
⚔️ MELEE — SLAM
AOE ground-pound that stuns nearby enemies and damages obstacles. Heavier elements hit harder and wider.
🌀 HYBRID — SURGE
Dash forward and hit the first enemy in your path. Also works as an escape dash when you need to break away.
🎯 RANGED — FOCUS
Fast long-range skillshot beyond your normal attack range. Great for finishing targets or clearing obstacles from a distance.
💨 Sprint
Sprint breaks Stun, Slow, and Silence on activation. It does not break Freeze. Running into enemies while sprinting deals chip damage and a knockback impulse — heavier elements push harder. Sprint also grants full immunity to Black Hole and Singularity pull while active.
Inside a Maelstrom, sprint provides partial relief from the depth-based slow — it won't save you at the core, but it's your best chance of reaching the edge before the implosion.
🌀 Warp Gates
Gate openings move along each arena edge. Walk through one to teleport to a random gate on the opposite side. Gates narrow from 3 per edge to 1 as the match progresses. After warping, a 4.5s cooldown bar appears — hitting a closed wall bounces you back.
Return warp: the moment you warp through a gate, a 1-second window opens — shown as a pulsing cyan ring with a countdown arc around your character. Cross any edge during that window and you'll warp straight back through the exact same gate you just used. The cooldown starts after the window expires, not before.
💡 On mobile, tap any enemy to lock onto them. Tap empty space to clear the lock.
🌩️ Weather Zones
Weather zones drift across the arena and affect all players equally. They turn neutral ground into contested space worth fighting over. Glowing pill badges appear under your character showing exactly what you're getting — step out and they vanish instantly. Entering a zone flashes the screen edge in the storm's colour.
🔥 HEATWAVE
+40% damage inside. Kill someone here and you get a 1.8× speed burst and heal 40% of your HP. Stay aggressive.
❄️ BLIZZARD
−40% move speed. Your first hit every 5 seconds deals ×1.8 damage — slow down, wait for the moment.
⚡ THUNDERSTORM
Cooldowns drain 55% faster. Every ability hit arcs 35% of its damage to the nearest other enemy — chain damage zone.
🌧️ DOWNPOUR
Heals 8 HP/s and grants 25% lifesteal on damage dealt. Fight here to stay healthy — standing still barely helps.
🌪️ SANDSTORM
Range cut by 45% but close-range damage surges ×1.65. Melee heroes own this zone. Ranged heroes are in trouble.
🕳️ BLACK HOLE
Gravity pulls toward the centre. Sprint to break free — walking won't save you near the core.
🌪️ Storm Convergence
When two storms drift close enough to deeply overlap, they merge into a single more powerful zone with a fresh timer. Every combination creates a unique effect that neither storm had alone.
Two storms of the same type merge into a MEGA version — same effect but amplified by 50%. MEGA zones have a thick pulsing outer ring so you can spot them immediately. Your buff label will show MEGA when you step inside.
⚡🔥 PLASMA STORM
Fire + Lightning. Abilities recharge fast, damage boosted. Every hit you take deals damage back to your attacker.
🌪️🔥 FIRESTORM
Fire + Wind. More damage and faster movement. Your movement leaves burning trail hazards that damage enemies who cross them — speed is now a weapon.
❄️🔥 FLASHPOINT
Fire + Ice. The zone detonates every 4 seconds, stunning and damaging everyone inside. Between blasts, everyone heals.
⚡🌪️ SUPERCELL
Lightning + Wind. Projectiles move faster, travel further, and pierce through one extra target. One shot can hit two people.
❄️⚡ WHITEOUT
Lightning + Ice. Everyone is frozen every 3 seconds. While frozen you are immune to incoming damage.
❄️🌪️ ARCTIC GALE
Wind + Ice. Extreme speed for everyone — slow heroes keep pace with fast ones. Abilities come off cooldown visibly faster.
🌪️💧 DUST DEVIL
Wind + Downpour. Knockback tripled on all hits. Enemy HP bars are hidden. Every attack sends someone flying.
🔥💧 MAGMA SURGE
Fire + Downpour. The zone deals 15 HP/s but grants 40% armour. Hit hard and absorb almost anything else.
❄️💧 PERMAFROST
Ice + Downpour. Slower movement, but ability damage doubled. Commit to fighting here.
⚡💧 SEISMIC CHARGE
Lightning + Downpour. Melee hits chain to all nearby enemies. Packing together is dangerous here.
🌀⚡ SINGULARITY
Black Hole + anything. Extreme gravitational pull. Sprint barely helps — find a warp gate.
💡 THE MAELSTROM — when a converged storm overlaps any other active zone, or three storms overlap simultaneously, they collapse into a massive singularity. It renders as a black hole — deep purple void, orbiting accretion disk, and an absolute black event horizon with a countdown inside. On spawn it yanks everyone to the centre regardless of map position. Inside: all damage doubled, kills reset cooldowns, all pickups pulled to the centre. A depth-based slow makes escaping the core brutally hard. After the timer hits zero it implodes — dealing damage scaled by how close you are (10% at the edge, up to 90% at the core). The zone then persists for 5 more seconds before fading. A 90s cooldown limits how often it can fire.

When two zones are close enough to potentially merge, a convergence % appears between them. Blue % = normal storm merge incoming. Orange/red % = a converged zone is approaching — Maelstrom possible.
🎁 Pickups
Health Packs (pink cross) heal 30% of your max HP over 3 seconds. A directional arrow appears around your character pointing toward the nearest one when your HP is critical.
Mana Pots (blue bottle) restore 50% of your max mana instantly. A blue arrow appears when you are running low. Grab them aggressively to keep abilities cycling.
🪨 Floating Obstacles
Obstacles drift, orbit, or bounce around the arena. They block projectiles, push characters on contact, and take damage from attacks. Large ones shatter into indestructible fragments. Small ones pop.
Sprint into them to knock them into enemies. Use Rock Buster to clear a lane or deny cover. Heavier elements push obstacles further.
🔥 Hazard Zones
Some abilities leave persistent ground zones that continue to deal damage or effects after the initial hit.
🔥 Flame Patch — EMBER
Burns for 8 damage/s for 3 seconds on the ground where Inferno lands.
🌀 Whirlpool — TIDE
Persists 3 seconds after cast — keeps pulling and dealing 12 damage/s.
💥 Aftershock — STONE
Cracked ground from SLAM slows anyone who steps in it for 2 seconds.
🔥 Hero Passives
Every hero has a unique passive that creates a deeper mechanical interaction. Full details are on each hero's Roster page — here is a quick reference.
🔥 EMBER — Flame Patch
Inferno leaves a burning zone on the ground.
🌊 TIDE — Whirlpool
Whirlpool persists 3s after casting — keeps pulling.
❄️ FROST — Shatter
Bonus damage on slowed targets (+20%) and frozen (+30%).
🌿 FLORA — Root Tether
Heals 6 HP/s while a rooted enemy is within 180px.
🪨 STONE — Aftershock
SLAM leaves a slow zone for 3 seconds.
💨 GALE — Tailwind
Sprinting charges next ability — +30% speed and range.
🌀 VOID — Phantom Step
After warping, one incoming hit phases straight through you.
✨ MYST — Arcane Echo
Killing with an ability refunds 50% of its cooldown.
⚡ VOLT — Static Charge
Autos build stacks (max 3) — next ability consumes them for +8% damage each.
⚙️ FORGE — Molten Core
While Iron Will is active, melee collisions deal +50% damage.
🔲 Shrinking Arena
The arena compresses to 40% of its original size by match end, forcing fights. Gate openings narrow from 3 per edge to 1 as the walls close in — plan your escape routes early.
